hero.title: Supply Chain
hero.subtitle: Track products, suppliers, certifications, inventory and shipments through a unified platform with automated compliance monitoring, real-time alerts, and intelligent risk detection.

features.title: From CRUD to intelligent compliance monitoring
features.subtitle: HalalChain is not just a management system. It's a compliance-driven automation platform that monitors, alerts, and scores your supply chain health.

traceability.title: Product Traceability
traceability.description: End-to-end tracking from supplier to consumer with QR code verification. Public traceability pages require no login.

compliance.title: Compliance Monitoring
compliance.description: Automated certificate expiry detection, expired certificate alerts, compliance issue tracking, and a transparent compliance score (0-100) with explainable factors.

automation.title: Automation Engine
automation.description: Four automated rules run daily: certificate expiry alerts, expired certificate escalation, low inventory warnings, and shipment delay detection. Idempotent with built-in duplicate prevention.

certifications.title: Halal Certifications
certifications.description: Centralize certification management with digital document storage, expiry monitoring, file uploads to Cloudinary, and automated renewal reminders.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reporting
analytics.description: Comprehensive dashboards, date-range analytics for inventory, POs, shipments, certificates, and exportable reports in CSV/XLSX/PDF formats.

notifications.title: Real-time Notifications
notifications.description: In-app alerts via Server-Sent Events for low stock, certificate events, and shipment delays. Fire-and-forget email delivery via Resend or SMTP with exponential retry.

workflow.title: Traceability Flow
workflow.subtitle: From supplier registration to consumer verification, every step is tracked, certified, and verifiable through QR codes.

product.label: Product
product.description: Log products with SKU, batch, and halal status

certification.label: Certification
certification.description: Attach certificates with automated expiry monitoring

warehouse.label: Warehouse
warehouse.description: Manage inventory with reorder level alerts

consumer.label: Consumer
consumer.description: Verify authenticity via QR code — no login required

explanation.title: Full supply chain transparency with compliance baked in
explanation.p1: HalalChain creates a digital thread connecting every entity in your supply chain. Each product batch receives a unique QR code that follows it from raw materials to the end consumer, enabling instant verification.
explanation.p2: Suppliers are onboarded with verifiable halal certifications. The platform automatically monitors certificate expiry dates and escalates expired certificates with high-severity alerts to compliance teams.
explanation.p3: The automation engine runs daily checks: detecting overdue shipments, scanning inventory for low-stock items, and generating compliance scores that give management a single KPI for supply chain health.

compliance.title: Automated Compliance Monitoring
compliance.subtitle: The platform continuously monitors your supply chain health and alerts you to risks before they become problems.

certificateExpiry.title: Certificate Expiry Detection
certificateExpiry.subtitle: Scans all certificates daily. Detects expirations within 30 days and sends alerts to managers and admins via in-app notification and email.

certificateExpired.title: Expired Certificate Escalation
certificateExpired.subtitle: Identifies already-expired certificates and creates high-severity compliance issues. Triggers immediate notifications to responsible teams.

lowInventory.title: Low Inventory Detection
lowInventory.subtitle: Compares current stock against reorder levels. Generates alerts suggesting replenishment actions without automatically placing orders.

shipmentDelay.title: Shipment Delay Detection
shipmentDelay.subtitle: Automatically detects shipments past their estimated arrival date that haven't been marked delivered. Prevents duplicate daily alerts.

complianceScore.title: Compliance Scoring
complianceScore.subtitle: A transparent 0-100 score based on 5 factors: expired certs (-30pt), expiring certs (-15pt), delayed shipments (up to -20pt), low inventory (up to -15pt), and certificate coverage (up to -20pt). Each deduction is explainable.

realTimeAlerts.title: Real-time Alerts
realTimeAlerts.subtitle: All automation events stream via Server-Sent Events to the dashboard instantly. Email delivery is fire-and-forget with 3 retry attempts and exponential backoff.

compliance.scoreNote: See the Compliance Score KPI on your dashboard. Every deduction is transparent — hover or click to see why each point was deducted.

verificationDemo.title: Public QR Code Verification
verificationDemo.subtitle: End consumers can verify product authenticity instantly by scanning the QR code on packaging. No account or login required.

qrScanning.title: QR Code Scanning
qrScanning.description: Each product has a unique QR code on packaging. Consumers scan with any smartphone camera — no app required.

productVerification.title: Product Details
productVerification.description: The public portal displays product origin, supplier, batch number, and halal certification status instantly.

certificateValidation.title: Certificate Validation
certificateValidation.description: View all attached halal certificates with certifying bodies, issue dates, and expiry information at a glance.

shipmentHistory.title: Supply Chain Journey
shipmentHistory.description: Track the complete journey from supplier through warehouses to retailer with timestamps and location data.

cta.tryText: Try it now with a real seeded product from our database

architecture.title: Platform Architecture
architecture.subtitle: A modern, layered architecture with a dedicated automation engine for intelligent compliance monitoring.

flow.title: How Automation Works
flow.description: The Automation Engine runs daily at 08:00, evaluating 4 rules transactionally. Each rule checks conditions against the database, creates notifications with deduplication, and dispatches emails asynchronously.
steps: Results stream to dashboard in real-time

stats.title: Enterprise-grade compliance features
stats.subtitle: Built for businesses that require complete visibility, automated monitoring, and verifiable compliance across their halal supply chain.

screenshots.title: See HalalChain in Action
screenshots.subtitle: Compliance-focused dashboard with automation alerts, traceability views, and management controls.

dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.description: KPI cards including Compliance Score, live automation alerts, and operational widgets

inventory.title: Inventory with Low Stock Alerts
inventory.description: Real-time stock levels with automated low-inventory detection and replenishment suggestions

traceability.title: Public Traceability Portal
traceability.description: Consumer-facing product verification with full supply chain timeline — no login required

users.title: RBAC User Management
users.description: Role-based access control with ADMIN, MANAGER, and STAFF roles, audit logs, and invitation flow

techStack.title: Built with Modern Technology
techStack.subtitle: Enterprise-grade tools and frameworks powering the HalalChain compliance platform.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
cta.subtitle: Join forward-thinking halal businesses that trust HalalChain for end-to-end traceability, automated compliance monitoring, and operational intelligence.

footer.description: Supply Chain Compliance & Traceability Platform — automated compliance monitoring, QR verification, and operational intelligence for modern halal businesses.
